Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1627 "DEEPSTRIKE-7000-1627" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Deep Strike.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $7000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Also NOP'd out the JSR $31A3 instruction at $1642 to remove the copyright nag screen.
